description: history attribute — bare .Variant target ignores history (§51.0.N). Same history-bearing composite as engine-history-restore-rt, but re-entry is via the BARE .Playing target (#fresh), not .Playing.history. Per the §51.0.N form table, bare .Variant enters the composite and starts the inner engine at its initial= (.Exploring) even when history is set — the history cell is preserved but ignored on this entry. The reset twin of the restore case.
rationale: §51.0.N `@appMode = .Playing` (bare) transitions to the variant and starts the inner engine at initial= even when history is set; only `.Playing.history` restores.
